name: PDFix
description: PDFix — SDK for PDF accessibility remediation, tagged PDF creation, and ADA compliance automation.

seo.title: PDFix — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PDFix: PDFix — SDK for PDF accessibility remediation, tagged PDF creation, and ADA compliance automation.

when_to_use: Automated PDF accessibility remediation for ADA compliance
Tagged PDF creation for screen reader support in documents
Section 508 compliance automation for government documents
Bulk PDF accessibility tagging via SDK for document managers
Converting legacy PDFs to accessible tagged PDF format

pros: Auto-tagging saves weeks of manual remediation
Fills rare gap in PDF accessibility tooling
SDK for Win, macOS, Linux, web
Used by government and publishing orgs
cons: Niche scope — not for general PDF work
review.verdict: Essential if you must ship accessible PDFs — a rare specialist, priced accordingly.
review.best_for: Publishers, government, and universities automating ADA/Section 508 PDF remediation.
review.not_for: General PDF generation — many cheaper, broader tools exist.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
